ChatGptProvider.cs.Label: External Client
ChatGptProvider.cs.Description: This client class was built to send HTTP requests to an external API and receive an analysis from a 3rd party AI. It supports cancellation and handles a variety of exceptions.

NoteDtos.Label: Try Block
NoteDtos.Text: All code that could throw an exception is wrapped in a try-catch block to prevent unhandled exceptions from reaching the user and to provide an opportunity to log errors for those excpetions.

NoteDtos.Label: Http Exceptions
NoteDtos.Text: This block will catch any exceptions thrown by the PostAsync or EnsureSuccessStatusCode calls. The important data to capture here is the error code, exception message, and the request object.

NoteDtos.Label: Json Exceptions
NoteDtos.Text: This block will catch any exceptions thrown when attempting to deserialize the http response. The important data to capture here is the response object to compare to the object it was being deserializatied into.

NoteDtos.Label: Canceled Exceptions
NoteDtos.Text: This block will catch any request cancellations that occur while waiting for a response. Since there is nothing to log and the request in progress is not needed, these exceptions are re-thrown immediately.
